name: Vampirism
desc: Your basic attack has lifesteal.

name: Vampirism2
desc:
Your basic attack has lifesteal.
Your spells have 50% lifesteal.

name: OneWithNothing
desc: If you end your turn with 0 mana, your Mana Regeneration is doubled.

name: OneWithNothing2
desc:
If you end your turn with 0 mana, your Mana Regeneration is doubled.
Bonus ability: Slit Wrists

name: BedBugs
desc: You start battles with 2 beefy leech familiars.

name: BedBugs2
desc: You start battles with 4 beefy leech familiars.

name: WormLord
desc: When you take damage, spawn a leech familiar.

name: WormLord2
desc:
When you take damage, spawn a leech familiar.
Your basic attack spawns leech familiars.

name: InfiniteRebirth
desc: At the end of each round, if there is a body on the map and you're downed, you respawn on that tile with 1 HP and +10 temporary Speed. If that body was a party member, you spawn with full HP instead.

name: InfiniteRebirth2
desc: At the end of each round, if there is a body on the map and you're downed, you respawn on that tile with 25% HP and +10 temporary Speed. If that body was a party member, you spawn with full HP instead.

name: SacrificialLamb
desc: When you're downed, allies gain All Stats Up and take an extra turn.

name: SacrificialLamb2
desc:
When you're downed, allies gain All Stats Up and take an extra turn.
You can't get injuries.

name: DeathIncarnate
desc: Destroy a random non-boss enemy at the start of each battle.

name: DeathIncarnate2
desc: Destroy a random enemy at the start of each battle. If this hits a boss, deal 50 damage instead.

name: OffloadPain
desc: When you heal, deal 1 damage to each enemy.

name: OffloadPain2
desc: When you heal, deal 2 damage to each enemy and you gain +1 Thorns.

name: CambionConception
desc: When you're downed, spawn a demon kitten familiar.

name: CambionConception2
desc: When you're downed, spawn 2 demon kitten familiars.

name: Leechmother
desc: Your basic attack spawns a leech familiar.

name: Leechmother2
desc: Your basic attack spawns a beefy leech familiar.

name: Infected
desc: When you down a unit, reanimate it with 50% HP.

name: Infected2
desc: When you down a unit, reanimate it with full HP.

name: LastGasp
desc:
When you're downed, deal 6 damage to each enemy and heal 6 HP to all allies.
Bonus ability: Seppuku

name: LastGasp2
desc:
When you're downed, deal 10 damage to each enemy and heal 10 HP to all allies.
Bonus ability: Seppuku

name: RelentlessDead
desc: At the end of each round, spawn a zombie kitten familiar onto a random tile.

name: RelentlessDead2
desc: At the end of each round, spawn 2 zombie kitten familiars onto random tiles.

name: ChainsOfGuilt
desc: When an enemy downs you and it wasn't a boss, it joins your party permanently.

name: ChainsOfGuilt2
desc: When an enemy downs you and it wasn't a boss, it joins your party permanently. If it was a boss, inflict Stun 3 on it.

name: DarkPriest
desc: At the start of each battle, if you don't have a weapon, gain a temporary Soul Dagger weapon.

name: DarkPriest2
desc: At the start of each battle, if you don't have a weapon, gain a temporary Soul Dagger weapon. You can use your weapon action an extra time each turn.

name: Undeath
desc: When you're downed, reanimate each ally to 33% HP. (Once per battle.)

name: Undeath2
desc: When you're downed, reanimate each ally to max HP. (Once per battle.)

name: NumbingLeeches
desc: Your basic attack deals 0 damage but its status and hit effects are tripled.

name: NumbingLeeches2
desc:
Your basic attack deals 0 damage, but its status and hit effects are tripled.
Your basic attack inflicts Mana Leech.

name: EternalHealth
desc: Suffer only Jinxed when downed. When your party wins a battle, if you were downed, heal to full.

name: EternalHealth2
desc: Suffer only Jinxed when downed. When your party wins a battle, if you were downed, heal to full. Your body is indestructible. When you're downed, allies get +1 [img:lck] for each Jinxed injury you have.

name: Torpor
desc: While you're downed, your basic attack is Haunt. Your body gains +6 corpse HP.

name: Torpor2
desc: While you're downed, your basic attack is Haunt and your spells are Spook. Your body gains +6 corpse HP.

name: SoulBound
desc: Your basic attack inflicts Soul Link.

name: SoulBound2
desc: Your basic attack inflicts Soul Link. Inflict Soul Link on a random enemy at the start of the battle.

name: Superstition
desc:
Your basic attack inflicts -1[img:lck]. 
When a unit damages you, inflict -1[img:lck] on it.

name: Superstition2
desc:
Your basic attack inflicts -1[img:lck] and has a 15% chance to inflict Fear.
When a unit damages you, inflict -1[img:lck] and a 15% to Fear on it.

name: ImmortalLeeches
desc: When a unit you inflicted Leeches on dies or loses its leeches, your next basic attack inflicts that many additional leeches.

name: ImmortalLeeches2
desc:
When a unit you inflicted Leeches on dies or loses its leeches, your next basic attack inflicts that many additional leeches.
Your basic attack inflicts +1 leech.

name: CorpseConnoisseur
desc:
Start each battle with 2-3 corpses near you.
When you destroy a corpse, heal 2 HP and spawn a food pickup.

name: CorpseConnoisseur2
desc:
Start each battle with 3-4 corpses near you.
When you destroy a corpse, heal 8 HP and spawn a food pickup.

name: Parasitic
desc: When you gain health, spawn a leech familiar.

name: Parasitic2
desc: When you gain health, spawn a leech familiar. 50% of the time, spawn a beefy leech instead.

name: SpreadSorrow
desc: When you inflict a debuff to an enemy, inflict that same debuff on another random enemy.

name: SpreadSorrow2
desc: When you inflict a debuff to an enemy, inflict that same debuff on 2 other random enemies.
